tasks.label: ROS2: colcon build (Debug)
tasks.command: source /opt/ros/$ROS_DISTRO/setup.bash && colcon build --symlink-install --cmake-args -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DCMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS=ON --no-warn-unused-cli && if [ -f install/setup.bash ]; then source install/setup.bash; fi && mkdir -p ${workspaceFolder}/.vscode/tmp && { echo "LD_LIBRARY_PATH=$LD_LIBRARY_PATH"; echo "AMENT_PREFIX_PATH=$AMENT_PREFIX_PATH"; echo "PYTHONPATH=$PYTHONPATH"; echo "PATH=$PATH"; echo "CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH=$CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH"; echo "ROS_DISTRO=$ROS_DISTRO"; echo "ROS_VERSION=$ROS_VERSION"; echo "ROS_PYTHON_VERSION=$ROS_PYTHON_VERSION"; echo "RMW_IMPLEMENTATION=$RMW_IMPLEMENTATION"; } > ${workspaceFolder}/.vscode/tmp/node_env.env

tasks.label: ROS2: Clean and Build
tasks.command: rm -rf build/ install/ log/ && source /opt/ros/$ROS_DISTRO/setup.bash && colcon build --symlink-install --cmake-args -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DCMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS=ON --no-warn-unused-cli

tasks.label: ROS2: Run Coverage
tasks.command: source /opt/ros/$ROS_DISTRO/setup.bash && colcon build --cmake-args -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS="--coverage" -DCMAKE_C_FLAGS="--coverage" --no-warn-unused-cli && colcon test && mkdir -p ${workspaceFolder}/coverage && lcov --capture --directory build/ --output-file ${workspaceFolder}/coverage/coverage.info && lcov --remove ${workspaceFolder}/coverage/coverage.info '/opt/ros/*' '/usr/*' --output-file ${workspaceFolder}/coverage/coverage.info

tasks.label: ROS2: Build Current Test Package (Coverage)
tasks.command: source /opt/ros/$ROS_DISTRO/setup.bash && PKG=$(basename $(dirname ${fileDirname})) && colcon build --symlink-install --packages-select $PKG --cmake-args -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS="--coverage" -DCMAKE_C_FLAGS="--coverage" --no-warn-unused-cli && if [ -f install/setup.bash ]; then source install/setup.bash; fi && mkdir -p ${workspaceFolder}/.vscode/tmp && cp build/$PKG/${fileBasenameNoExtension} ${workspaceFolder}/.vscode/tmp/current_test_binary && { echo "LD_LIBRARY_PATH=$LD_LIBRARY_PATH"; echo "AMENT_PREFIX_PATH=$AMENT_PREFIX_PATH"; echo "PYTHONPATH=$PYTHONPATH"; echo "PATH=$PATH"; echo "CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH=$CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH"; echo "ROS_DISTRO=$ROS_DISTRO"; echo "ROS_VERSION=$ROS_VERSION"; echo "ROS_PYTHON_VERSION=$ROS_PYTHON_VERSION"; echo "RMW_IMPLEMENTATION=$RMW_IMPLEMENTATION"; } > ${workspaceFolder}/.vscode/tmp/test.env

tasks.label: ROS2: Generate Coverage Report (Current Test Package)
tasks.command: PKG=$(basename $(dirname ${fileDirname})) && mkdir -p ${workspaceFolder}/coverage && lcov --capture --directory build/$PKG --output-file ${workspaceFolder}/coverage/coverage_$PKG.info && lcov --remove ${workspaceFolder}/coverage/coverage_$PKG.info '/opt/ros/*' '/usr/*' --output-file ${workspaceFolder}/coverage/coverage_$PKG.info && genhtml ${workspaceFolder}/coverage/coverage_$PKG.info --output-directory ${workspaceFolder}/coverage/html_$PKG && cp ${workspaceFolder}/coverage/coverage_$PKG.info ${workspaceFolder}/coverage/lcov.info && lcov --list ${workspaceFolder}/coverage/coverage_$PKG.info
